incidents.short_description: Payments API returning 500s — DB connection pool exhaustion
incidents.description: Payments /v2/payments endpoint returning 500s for ~18% of requests since 02:55 UTC. DB connection pool exhausted.
incidents.resolution_notes: Deployed hotfix raising DB pool and adding eviction policy (CHG-1002). Verified via dashboard.

work_notes.note: Incident auto-created from PagerDuty alert PD-ALT-66102
Confirmed pool exhaustion via metrics; engaging payments team.
Hotfix CHG-1002 raised; fix identified; emergency CAB requested.
Error rate back to baseline; closing incident.

incidents.short_description: Auth service intermittent 503s — pods restarting every ~6h
incidents.description: Auth-service pods OOM-killed on regular interval. Login failures for affected users.
incidents.resolution_notes: Hotfix CHG-1003 deployed to close JWT cache leak. OOM loop stopped.

work_notes.note: Incident auto-created from PagerDuty alert PD-ALT-66184
Confirmed JWT cache leak; engaging auth team.
Memory stable over 30-min window; closing incident.
